name:
Showcase: Rich HTTP exchange panels for browser network responses.
   These tests demonstrate that the same rich HTML panel works for
   browser-level network calls (page/wait-for-response, page/on-response),
   not just API testing calls. > browser network responses with exchange panels > multiple browser responses — on-response listener

descriptionHtml: Registers a response listener with page/on-response to collect multiple network responses during navigation. Each captured response is attached as a separate exchange panel via allure/api-step. Demonstrates that on-response captures ALL network activity.
